docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76133951) FILED BY PLAINTIFF H MART SAN FRANCISCO, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDON TRUCKING COMPANY RIVERA, CARLOS DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-24-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-23-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-02-2025
